description_long: This object resembles a stylized, blocky red crustacean with a rectangular, pixelated body and eight long, jointed legs radiating from its underside. The main body is tall and angular, with a stepped, layered appearance at the top, giving it a digital or voxel-art aesthetic. The legs are segmented and bent at sharp angles, ending in pointed tips, and are evenly spaced around the body. The surface is uniformly colored in shades of red with darker pixel patterns, suggesting a hard exoskeleton. There are no visible claws or antennae, and the eyes are not apparent on any side. The overall form is reminiscent of a crab or spider, but with a distinctly geometric, artificial design.
description: A blocky, red, pixel-art style crustacean with eight angular legs and a tall, rectangular body. The surface is hard and patterned, with no visible claws or antennae.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the tall, rectangular body and the angular, jointed legs extending outward and downward.
description_view_1: The top-down view shows the symmetrical arrangement of the eight legs and the stepped, pixelated pattern on the body.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, but from the opposite side, again emphasizing the body height and leg structure.
description_view_3: The front view displays the flat face of the body and the even distribution of the legs, with no visible facial features.
